available_models.claude-opus-4-5: Most capable — best for complex reasoning, long-form generation, nuanced tasks
available_models.claude-opus-4-0: Previous Opus generation — strong capability, slightly lower cost
available_models.claude-sonnet-4-5: Balanced speed + capability — recommended default for most tasks
available_models.claude-sonnet-3-7: Extended thinking variant — ideal for step-by-step reasoning tasks
available_models.claude-haiku-3-5: Fast and lightweight — best for simple Q&A, classification, quick responses

available_models.gemini-3.1-pro-preview: Latest Pro Preview — advanced reasoning, tool use, 1M context, agentic workflows (Feb 2026)
available_models.gemini-3-flash-preview: Latest Flash Preview — frontier multimodal, strongest agentic/vibe-coding, 1M context (Dec 2025)
available_models.gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview: Latest Flash-Lite Preview — fastest budget model, 1M context, low-latency (Mar 2026)
available_models.gemini-2.5-pro: Stable Pro — deep reasoning, 1M context, multimodal, best for complex tasks
available_models.gemini-2.5-flash: Stable Flash — best price-performance, low-latency, high-volume tasks
available_models.gemini-2.5-flash-lite: Stable Flash-Lite — fastest/cheapest in 2.5 family, budget high-frequency tasks
available_models.gemini-2.0-flash: Previous Flash (deprecated) — fast, 1M context, native tool use
available_models.gemini-1.5-pro: Legacy Pro — 2M context window, good for document-heavy tasks
available_models.gemini-1.5-flash: Legacy Flash — cost-effective for simpler tasks
available_models.gemma-4-31b-it: Gemma 4 31B — dense, 256K context, frontier reasoning and coding (Apr 2026)
available_models.gemma-4-26b-a4b-it: Gemma 4 26B MoE (A4B active) — fast MoE inference, 256K context (Apr 2026)
available_models.gemma-4-e4b-it: Gemma 4 E4B (4.5B effective) — multimodal with audio, 128K context, laptop/server
available_models.gemma-4-e2b-it: Gemma 4 E2B (2.3B effective) — multimodal with audio, 128K context, on-device
available_models.gemma-2-27b-it: Gemma 2 27B — previous gen large, strong general-purpose
available_models.gemma-2-9b-it: Gemma 2 9B — previous gen mid, efficient general use
available_models.gemma-2-2b-it: Gemma 2 2B — previous gen compact, minimal resource footprint

available_models.gpt-4o: Most capable GPT-4 class — best for complex tasks, vision, tool use
available_models.gpt-4o-mini: Fast and cheap GPT-4 class — excellent for most everyday tasks
available_models.o3: OpenAI reasoning model — best for multi-step logic and math
available_models.o3-mini: Lightweight reasoning model — fast chain-of-thought at lower cost
available_models.o4-mini: Latest reasoning mini — strong coding and math, very fast
available_models.gpt-3.5-turbo: Legacy lightweight model — cheapest option for simple completions

available_models.nvidia/llama-3.3-nemotron-super-49b-v1.5: NVIDIA Nemotron Super 49B v1.5 — current high-capability general-purpose model
available_models.nvidia/llama-3.1-nemotron-ultra-253b-v1: NVIDIA Nemotron Ultra 253B v1 — strongest Nemotron reasoning model
available_models.nvidia/llama-3.1-nemotron-nano-8b-v1: NVIDIA Nemotron Nano 8B v1 — fast lightweight fallback
available_models.nvidia/nvidia-nemotron-nano-9b-v2: NVIDIA Nemotron Nano 9B v2 — current compact fallback
available_models.meta/llama-3.1-70b-instruct: Meta Llama 3.1 70B — strong reasoning and coding, 128K context
available_models.meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct: Meta Llama 3.3 70B — newer high-capability Llama fallback
available_models.microsoft/phi-4-mini-instruct: Microsoft Phi-4 Mini — compact high-capability fallback

orchestrator.name: Orchestrator
orchestrator.description: Master coordinator — delegates to all other agents

researcher.name: Researcher
researcher.description: Web research, information gathering, source verification

publisher.name: Publisher
publisher.description: Tiered output formatter — markdown for mid-complexity, styled self-contained HTML for detailed/visual requests

cleanup.name: Cleanup
cleanup.description: Pre-deployment sanity check — scans for secrets, removes temp files, validates structure

model_fallback_policy.description: Selected model always attempted first; remaining models ranked by competency + quota fit + recent health
